act5_role: Define and constrain agent role/response/authority boundaries for controlled Act 5 execution staging.
authority_scope: Maintain agent profile and scope policy definitions
Provide policy framing for stop/uncertainty behavior
not_authority: Does not auto-enforce every permission at runtime yet
Does not directly execute organ build tasks
forbidden_actions: Claim full permission enforcement without evidence
dashboards_or_utilities: No dedicated dashboard utility registered in this step
known_blockers: Runtime permission enforcement layer is minimal
No dedicated checker for response-contract enforcement yet
Work-session ACK integration is pending Step 5
no_fake_green_rules: Authority must be described as limits, not claims
Missing runtime enforcement must be explicit
No execution readiness claim without gate evidence
No promotion of raw advisory into direct commands

readiness_claim.statement: Officio Agentis is checkable and useful for boundary guidance, but lacks evidence for Level 5 minimal readiness in enforcement depth.
known_gaps: Dedicated Act 5 enforcement checker is not yet formalized
